title: Edition version data (generated)
description: Shape of generated/<edition>.json. MACHINE-WRITTEN. Each version row is derived from the edition's upstream source ref. PRODUCT-AGNOSTIC: Commerce rows carry php/composer/services; App Builder/EDS rows carry node/aioCli/runtimes/templates. A row needs sourceRef + at least one runtime requirement (php OR node).

sourceSha.description: upstream commit SHA this was generated from

additionalProperties.description: A version row needs sourceRef + at least one runtime requirement (php for Commerce, node for App Builder/EDS).

node.description: App Builder/EDS: required local Node, e.g. >=20

aioCli.description: App Builder: latest aio CLI version (npm)

runtimes.description: App Builder: I/O Runtime action runtimes, e.g. [nodejs:20, nodejs:18]

sourceRef.description: the upstream ref this row came from, e.g. magento-cloud@2.4.8 or npm:@adobe/aio-cli@11.1.2
